name: Jiffy
author: Poki
description: Jiffy is a fast-paced platform game where you’re on a thrilling adventure! Dash through platforms, leap to great heights, and blast your enemies. Take your skills to the next level in normal mode, embark on an epic journey in endless mode, or jump into battle mode and see how many enemies you can defeat! Whether you’re jumping high or shooting from the air, every moment is packed with action. Are you ready to become the ultimate hero? How to play Jiffy? Move: A/D or the left and right arrow keys Jump: the space bar Shoot: the space bar Who created Jiffy? Jiffy is created by redsnowdev. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jiffy for free? You can play Jiffy for free on Poki. Can I play Jiffy on mobile devices and desktop? Jiffy can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
